tools.name: biz_generate
tools.description: Generate business ideas based on optional sector, problem statement, or constraints. Returns structured idea briefs with problem/solution/target/hooks.

sector.description: Industry or sector (e.g. healthtech, edtech, fintech, SaaS, consumer)

problem.description: A problem or pain point to build around

constraints.description: Constraints like budget, solo founder, B2B only, no-code, etc.

tools.name: biz_validate
tools.description: Run a full viability analysis on a given idea: problem clarity, ICP, solution fit, revenue model options, market size estimate, and ICE score.

context.description: Additional context about the idea, target market, or constraints

tools.name: biz_ice_score
tools.description: Compute an ICE score (Impact 1-10, Confidence 1-10, Ease 1-10) for a business idea with rationale for each dimension.

tools.name: biz_canvas
tools.description: Generate a complete Business Model Canvas (all 9 blocks) for a saved idea slug.

idea_slug.description: Slug of the saved idea (e.g. ai-meal-planning)

tools.name: biz_pitchdeck
tools.description: Generate a 10-slide pitch deck (Problem, Solution, Market, Product, Business Model, Traction, Competition, Team, Financials, Ask) for a saved idea.

tools.name: biz_name
tools.description: Generate business name options for an idea with branding score (memorability, pronounceability, uniqueness).

style.description: Naming style: coined, descriptive, metaphor, acronym, portmanteau

tools.name: biz_name_check
tools.description: Check availability of a business name: .com domain (DNS), Twitter/X handle, Instagram handle, LinkedIn company page.

name.description: Business name to check (e.g. NutriAI, Validea)

tools.name: biz_competitors
tools.description: List direct and indirect competitors for an idea, analyze their strengths/weaknesses, and identify differentiation opportunities.

market.description: Optional market focus (e.g. US, APAC, SMB, enterprise)

tools.name: biz_financials
tools.description: Model unit economics, CAC/LTV ratio, gross margin, break-even timeline, and 12-month P&L projection.

tools.name: biz_playbook
tools.description: Generate a 30/60/90-day execution playbook with milestones, KPIs, resource requirements, and risk flags.

tools.name: biz_full_run
tools.description: Run the full end-to-end analysis pipeline: validate → canvas → competitors → financials → names → playbook. Saves all artifacts to ideas/{slug}/.

idea.description: The business idea to fully analyze

tools.name: biz_tam
tools.description: Deep TAM/SAM/SOM sizing using both top-down and bottom-up methodology. Produces addressable market estimates with geographic breakdowns.

geography.description: Geographic scope (e.g. US, Global, APAC, Europe)

tools.name: biz_personas
tools.description: Generate 3-5 customer personas with Jobs-to-be-Done framing, ICP prioritization, and willingness-to-pay estimates per segment.

segment_focus.description: Optional: focus on a specific segment (e.g. SMB, enterprise, consumers)

tools.name: biz_trends
tools.description: Analyze industry trends using PESTLE + technology S-curves. Maps tailwinds, headwinds, and market timing window across 1/3/5-year horizons.

tools.name: biz_swot
tools.description: SWOT analysis + Porter's Five Forces (each force rated 1-5) with strategic cross-analysis (SO/WO/ST/WT strategies).

tools.name: biz_pricing
tools.description: Design a 3-tier pricing architecture with model selection, competitor price table, value metric, and expansion revenue paths.

model_preference.description: Optional pricing model preference (e.g. usage-based, seat-based, freemium)

tools.name: biz_gtm
tools.description: Go-to-market strategy: GTM motion, beachhead segment, 0→100 and 100→1000 channels, positioning statement, and 30-day launch plan.

stage.description: Current stage: pre-launch, launched, or scaling

tools.name: biz_journey
tools.description: Map the 7-stage customer journey (Awareness → Advocacy) with moments of truth, drop-off risks, and delight opportunities.

persona.description: Optional: focus on a specific persona (references personas artifact if available)

tools.name: biz_landscape
tools.description: Deep competitive intelligence: funding trajectories, moat analysis, white-space map, positioning grid, and competitive response scenarios.

market.description: Optional market focus (e.g. US, APAC, SMB, enterprise)

tools.name: biz_model
tools.description: 3-scenario financial model (base/upside/downside) with monthly P&L, cohort retention, sensitivity analysis, and funding requirements.

tools.name: biz_risks
tools.description: Risk register (probability × impact), 3-scenario narratives (base/upside/downside), regulatory flags, and 90-day assumption validation tests.

tools.name: biz_expansion
tools.description: Market entry mode analysis, 3-phase geographic/vertical expansion roadmap, localization requirements, and measurable go/no-go criteria per phase.

target_markets.description: Optional: specific markets to analyze (e.g. EU, APAC, LATAM)

tools.name: biz_synthesis
tools.description: Executive synthesis: reads all available artifacts and produces a board-level brief with conviction score (1-10), 5 key decisions, and 90-day action roadmap.

tools.name: biz_deep_run
tools.description: Full deep-analysis pipeline (15-step workflow + names): validate → personas → trends → market → tam → financials → model → swot → pricing → gtm → journey → risks → landscape → expansion → synthesis → names. Saves 16 artifacts to ideas/{slug}/.

idea.description: The business idea to fully analyze

tools.name: biz_recall
tools.description: Full-text search across all stored ideas, analyses, and artifacts.

type.description: Filter by type: ideas, validations, financials, playbooks, names, tam, personas, trends, swot, pricing, gtm, journey, landscape, model, risks, expansion, synthesis
